new_classes.label_en: Other sparkling wine, in containers holding ≤ 2 l (CN 2204 10 94)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Schaumwein, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 l (KN 2204 10 94)
new_classes.definition_en: Sparkling wine of fresh grapes falling under CN heading 2204, subheading 2204 10 (sparkling wine), other than Champagne (2204 10 11) and Prosecco (2204 10 15), presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres. The wine bears the sparkling wine quality (excess pressure ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C as per subheading note 1 to Chapter 22) and does not carry a protected designation of origin qualifying it as Champagne or Prosecco.

new_classes.label_en: Other sparkling wine designation quality (neither Champagne nor Prosecco PDO)
new_classes.label_de: Qualitätsmerkmal anderer Schaumwein (weder Champagne noch Prosecco g.U.)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a sparkling wine that is neither a Champagne with protected designation of origin nor a Prosecco with protected designation of origin, used to discriminate CN subheading 2204 10 94 from its siblings 2204 10 11 (Champagne) and 2204 10 15 (Prosecco).

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22041094 is brief: it covers "other" sparkling wine (i.e. not Champagne 22041011, not Prosecco 22041015) in containers ≤ 2 l, with the sparkling wine qualification governed by subheading note 1 (excess pressure ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C from CO2). The proposed axioms capture: (1) membership in WineFreshGrapesGrapeMust2204 as parent, (2) the SparklingWineQuality (excess pressure), (3) a new OtherSparklingWineDesignationQuality that excludes Champagne and Prosecco PDO designations, and (4) container size ≤ 2 l via SmallContainer. Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because: (a) the complement restrictions are placed on the quality class rather than directly on the product class (a modelling approximation to stay within OWL 2 DL), and (b) the full text of subheading note 1 (precise pressure threshold of ≥ 3 bar) is not yet represented by a numeric datatype restriction on the hasExcessPressureAtTwentyDegrees property — adding that restriction would require introducing an intermediate ExcessPressureQuality individual that is not yet in the TBox. The sibling subheading 22041098 (containers > 2 l) is discriminated by the SmallContainer restriction.
